title: Pilgrimage and Governors
description: In this year, Muhammad b. Hisham b. Ismail led the pilgrimage. I heard this from Ahmad b. Thabit- his informant-Ishaq b. Isa-Abu Ma'shar. It has been said that he who led the pilgrimage in it was Sulayman b. Hishim. It has also been said that Yazid b. Hisham"8 led the pilgrimage. The governor in this year of al-Madinah, Mecca, and al-TA'if was Muhammad b. Hisham. In charge of Iraq and the whole East was Yusuf b. 'Umar. In charge of Khurasan was Nasr b. Sayyar, though it has been said it was Ja'far b. Hanzalah. In charge of al-Basrah (16671 was Kathir b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
